hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

echo 'IMPORTANT CONTEXT TO PRESERVE: This is a FastMVP template project. Architecture: DDD+DI for backends, Feature-Sliced for frontends. OpenAPI is the boundary. Check .claude/learnings/gotchas.md for accumulated knowledge. Agents live in both .claude/agents/ (Claude Code) and .github/agents/ (Copilot).'

echo 'Checklist before finishing: (1) DDD boundaries respected? (2) Feature-Sliced layers correct? (3) @Log() decorators on new controllers/use-cases? (4) OpenAPI contract matches implementation? (5) No hardcoded styles in frontend?'
